Name: Abs
Summary: Calculates a number's absolute value.

Name: ACos
Summary: Returns the angle (measured in radians) having the specified value of it's hyperbolic cosine function.

Name: ACosDeg
Summary: Inverse cosine. Returns angle in degrees.

Name: ACosh
Summary: Returns the angle (measured in radians) having the specified value of it's hyperbolic cosine function.

Name: And
Summary: Logical-AND returns the boolean value, FALSE, if at least one argument has a value of FALSE. When all arguments are TRUE, then this function returns TRUE.

Name: AngleDegXY
Summary: Angle of a vector (point) in degrees in the XY plane (atan2).

Name: AreaFraction
Summary: AreaFraction

Name: ASin
Summary: Returns the angle (measured in radians) having the specified value of it's hyperbolic sine function.

Name: ASinDeg
Summary: Inverse sine. Returns angle in degrees.

Name: ASinh
Summary: Returns the angle (measured in radians) having the specified value of it's hyperbolic sine function.

Name: ATan
Summary: Calculates the angle made with the x-axis on a Cartesian coordinate plane by the specified (x, y) coordinates.

Name: ATan2
Summary: Returns the angle from the positive X-axis to the point (x, y). Note argument order is (x, y).

Name: ATan2Deg
Summary: Inverse tangent of y/x using both arguments. Returns angle in degrees.

Name: ATanDeg
Summary: Inverse tangent. Returns angle in degrees.

Name: ATanh
Summary: Calculates the hyperbolic tangent of a specified angle measured in radians.

Name: AveDev
Summary: Returns the average deviation from the average of all numeric values.

Name: Average
Summary: Calculates an average (arithmetic mean) for a series of numbers.

Name: BBC
Summary: BBC

Name: BomParam
Summary: Bom Parameter

Name: Ceiling
Summary: Returns the smallest whole number greater than or equal to the given number

Name: CenPoint
Summary: CenPoint

Name: Char
Summary: Returns the character specified by the code number from the character set for your computer.

Name: Choose
Summary: Choose from elements

Name: Clamp
Summary: Clamp a value to the inclusive range [lo..hi].

Name: Clean
Summary: Clean

Name: clxEllipse
Summary: Chord Length of Ellipse // to X-axis

Name: clyEllipse
Summary: Chord Length of Ellipse // to Y-axis

Name: Code
Summary: Gives you the numeric code corresponding the the first character in a specific text string.

Name: Combin
Summary: Returns the number of possible combinations (with repetitions) given a set of items and a number of chosen items from that set.

Name: CombinA
Summary: Returns the number of possible combinations (with repetitions) given a set of items and a number of chosen items from that set.

Name: Concatenate
Summary: Combines two or more text values into a single text string.

Name: Cos
Summary: Returns the angle (measured in radians) having the specified value of it's hyperbolic cosine function.

Name: CosDeg
Summary: Cosine of an angle specified in degrees.

Name: Cosh
Summary: Returns the angle (measured in radians) having the specified value of it's hyperbolic cosine function.

Name: Count
Summary: Counts how many cells are not blank.

Name: CountA
Summary: Counts how many cells are not blank.

Name: CurvePlane
Summary: CurvePlane

Name: Degrees
Summary: Converts radians to degrees.

Name: DegToRad
Summary: Convert degrees to radians.

Name: Delta
Summary: Compares two numbers and returns 1 if they are equal or 0 if they are not.

Name: DiffRoundM
Summary: Rounds a difference value to the nearest specified multiple

Name: DistanceXY
Summary: Distance between two points in the XY plane (ignores Z).

Name: ElemCount
Summary: Element Count

Name: EndPoint
Summary: EndPoint

Name: EntData
Summary: EntData

Name: Eq
Summary: Returns True if two numbers are equal within tolerance eps. If eps=0 exact equality is used.

Name: ErrorType
Summary: When an error value is returned, the ERRORTYPE function returns a numeric value corresponding to the UltraCalcErrorCode enumeration.

Name: Even
Summary: Rounds a positive number up and a negative number down to the nearest even integer.

Name: Exp
Summary: Calculates the mathematical constant, e, raised to the specified power.

Name: Fact
Summary: Returns the double factorial of a number.

Name: FactDouble
Summary: Returns the double factorial of a number.

Name: False
Summary: A constant function always returning the FALSE value of Boolean logic.

Name: Find
Summary: Finds one piece of text within another piece of text.

Name: FindText
Summary: Finds the existence of one string within another

Name: Fixed
Summary: Formats a numeric value rounded to a specified number of decimal places and with optional thousands separators.

Name: Floor
Summary: Calculates the next lesser whole number for a specified numeric value.

Name: FlowAngleDeg
Summary: Flow-field direction angle in degrees (0..360) using Noise2 at a given spatial scale.

Name: Gcd
Summary: Returns the greatest common divisor of integer values.

Name: GearProfile
Summary: Generates a discrete 2D point list for an involute gear.

Name: GeStep
Summary: Compares two numbers and returns 1 the first number is greater than or equal to the second or returns 0 if not.

Name: Grid
Summary: Convert a 1-based linear index i into integer (col,row) for a grid with given columns. Returned as (col,row,0).

Name: GridXY
Summary: Convert a 1-based linear index i into XY coordinates using a grid with given columns and pitch. Returned as (x,y,0).

Name: Hash01
Summary: Deterministic pseudo-random number in [0..1) derived from (i, seed).

Name: Hash2
Summary: Deterministic pseudo-random 2D point (u,v,0) where u and v are in [0..1), derived from (i, seed).

Name: HPerd
Summary: HPerd

Name: If
Summary: Returns value_if_true when condition is true, otherwise returns value_if_false.

Name: IfError
Summary: Returns one of two values depending on whether or not the first value is an error or not.

Name: Int
Summary: Calculates the interest rate yielded by a security investment redeemable at a future date, such as a zero coupon bond.

Name: InterPoint
Summary: InterPoint

Name: IsBlank
Summary: Returns TRUE if the specified value is blank.

Name: IsErr
Summary: Returns TRUE if the specified value is any error value without exception.

Name: IsError
Summary: Returns TRUE if the specified value is any error value without exception.

Name: IsEven
Summary: Returns TRUE if the specified value is an even number.

Name: IsInList
Summary: IsInList

Name: IsLogical
Summary: Returns TRUE if the specified value refers to a two-state logic or Boolean value.

Name: IsNa
Summary: Returns TRUE if an error value is #N/A (not applicable.)

Name: IsNonText
Summary: Returns TRUE if the specified value refers to any not-text value.

Name: IsNumber
Summary: Returns TRUE if the specified value refers to a numeric value.

Name: IsOdd
Summary: Returns TRUE if the specified value is an odd number.

Name: IsRef
Summary: Returns TRUE if the specified value is an UltraCalc reference.

Name: IsText
Summary: Returns TRUE if the specified value refers to a text (or string) value.

Name: ItemParam
Summary: Item Parameter

Name: Jitter
Summary: Add a deterministic random offset (jitter) to a point in XY. Useful for organic imperfections.

Name: KeyValue
Summary: Value of Key in a list

Name: LCase
Summary: LCase

Name: Lcm
Summary: Returns the least common multiple of integer values.

Name: Left
Summary: Gets the leftmost characters from a text value, up to the specified number of characters.

Name: Len
Summary: Counts the number of characters in a text value.

Name: Length
Summary: Length

Name: LengthXY
Summary: Compute XY length (magnitude) of a point treated as a vector.

Name: Lerp
Summary: Linear interpolation between a and b using parameter t.

Name: List
Summary: Creates a list from supplied arguments

Name: ListAdd
Summary: Adds arguments to existing list

Name: ListFromString
Summary: Helper Function to Deserialize List

Name: ListHasValue
Summary: Checks if a value exists in a list

Name: Ln
Summary: Calculates the natural logarithm of a specified numeric value.

Name: Log
Summary: Calculates a logarithm for a specified numeric value to the specified base.

Name: Log10
Summary: Calculates the logarithm (base 10) of a specified numeric value.

Name: Lower
Summary: Converts a text value to all lowercase letters.

Name: Matrix
Summary: Creates a Matrix from nos.

Name: MatrixD
Summary: Creates a displacement matrix

Name: MatrixL
Summary: Matrix from List

Name: MatrixR
Summary: Creates a rotation matrix

Name: Max
Summary: Gives you the largest numeric value out of a series.

Name: Median
Summary: Calculates the median value of a specified list of numeric values.

Name: Mid
Summary: Gets a specified number of characters from the middle of a text string, starting from a specified position in that string.

Name: midp
Summary: Middle point between two points

Name: MidPoint
Summary: MidPoint

Name: Min
Summary: Returns the minimum of a series of numbers.

Name: Mod
Summary: Gets the remainder following integer division of two numbers.

Name: ModN
Summary: Modulo that always returns a non-negative result (useful for patterns).

Name: MRound
Summary: Rounds a number to the nearest multiple of another number.

Name: Multinomial
Summary: Returns the multinomial of a set of numbers.

Name: MultiSplit
Summary: Create Multi Level Split

Name: mxlookup
Summary: Lookup from design tables

Name: NA
Summary: Returns #N/A!, the error value representing a not applicable result.

Name: NACAProfile
Summary: Generate a closed point list for a 4-digit NACA airfoil.

Name: NearestDist
Summary: Distance to the nearest seed (Worley F1).

Name: NearestIndex
Summary: Return the nearest seed index (cell id) for point p among seedCount seeds generated by RandInRect. Returns 1-based index; returns 0 when seedCount <= 0.

Name: NewLine
Summary: New Line Character

Name: Noise2
Summary: 2D value noise in [0..1) sampled at point p (uses XY). Use scaling (p/scale) for smoother fields.

Name: NoiseAngleDeg
Summary: Convert 2D noise at p into an angle in degrees (0..360).

Name: NormalizeXY
Summary: Normalize a vector in XY (unit length). Z is preserved.

Name: Not
Summary: Logical-NOT returns the inverse boolean value of it's argument.

Name: Nr
Summary: Numeric truth test. Returns True if the value is non-zero, False if it is zero.

Name: nth
Summary: Nth Element of List

Name: Odd
Summary: Rounds a positive number up and a negative number down to the nearest odd integer.

Name: OffsetExtra
Summary: Calculates Extra distance generated by offsetting two intersecting lines

Name: Or
Summary: Logical-OR returns the boolean value, TRUE, if at least one argument has a value of TRUE. When all arguments are FALSE, then this function returns FALSE.

Name: pAdd
Summary: Add point between two points

Name: pd
Summary: Distance between two points

Name: Pi
Summary: Returns the mathematical constant for the Greek letter, pi.

Name: Plane
Summary: Creates a Plane from x,y,z,w,d

Name: PlaneFromString
Summary: Creates a Plane from (x,y,z,w|d)

Name: PlaneVdi
Summary: Creates a Plane from vector and distance

Name: PlaneVor
Summary: Creates a Plane from vector and origin

Name: pMult
Summary: Multiply point by scalar

Name: pOffset
Summary: Offset point by scalar

Name: Point
Summary: Creates a Point from x,y,z

Name: PointFromString
Summary: Creates a Point from (x,y,z)

Name: Polar
Summary: Create a point from polar coordinates (r, angleDeg). Z is set to 0.

Name: Power
Summary: Raises the specific number to a power.

Name: Product
Summary: Multiplies a series of numbers to return their total product.

Name: px
Summary: X Co-Ordinate of Point Parameter

Name: py
Summary: Y Co-Ordinate of Point Parameter

Name: pz
Summary: Z Co-Ordinate of Point Parameter

Name: QuadPoint
Summary: QuadPoint

Name: Quotient
Summary: Performs integer division on two numbers disregarding any remainder.

Name: Radians
Summary: Converts degrees to radians.

Name: RadToDeg
Summary: Convert radians to degrees.

Name: Rand
Summary: Generates a pseudorandom integer between two specified numbers.

Name: RandBetween
Summary: Generates a pseudorandom integer between two specified numbers.

Name: RandInRect
Summary: Deterministic pseudo-random point uniformly distributed in a rectangle centered at origin.

Name: Range01
Summary: Map 1-based index i across count values to a 0..1 parameter (safe when count<=1).

Name: Remap
Summary: Remap x from input range [in0..in1] to output range [out0..out1].

Name: RepeatIndex
Summary: Repeat index i in the range 1..n (same as 1-based wraparound).

Name: Replace
Summary: Replaces a substring of a text value with some new text. This substring is specified by giving it's starting point and it's length in characters, within the original text value.

Name: Rept
Summary: Repeats text a specific number of times.

Name: Right
Summary: Gets the rightmost characters from a text value, up to the specified number of characters.

Name: Roman
Summary: Converts a number into a roman number as a string.

Name: Rotate
Summary: Rotate a point around the origin in the XY plane. Z is preserved.

Name: RotateAbout
Summary: Rotate a point about a given center in the XY plane. Z is preserved from p.

Name: RotatePoint
Summary: RotatePoint

Name: RotateX
Summary: Rotate a point around +X axis by angDeg (degrees).

Name: RotateY
Summary: Rotate a point around +Y axis by angDeg (degrees).

Name: RotateZ
Summary: Rotate a point around +Z axis by angDeg (degrees). Same as 2D Rotate but keeps Z.

Name: Round
Summary: Rounds a number to down to the specified number of digits.

Name: RoundDown
Summary: Rounds a number to down to the specified number of digits.

Name: Roundm
Summary: Rounds a value to the nearest specified multiple

Name: RoundUp
Summary: Rounds a number to up to the specified number of digits.

Name: Scale
Summary: Scale a point uniformly (X,Y,Z) by a scalar.

Name: Search
Summary: Returns the 1-based index of one string within another, searching case insensitively.

Name: SearchB
Summary: Returns the 1-based index of one string within another, searching case insensitively.

Name: SecondNearestDist
Summary: Distance to the second-nearest seed (Worley F2).

Name: Sentence
Summary: Sentence

Name: SeriesSum
Summary: Returns the sum of a power series.

Name: SetEngine
Summary: SetEngine

Name: SierpinskiPoints
Summary: Generates translation points for a Sierpinski Tetrahedron at a given recursion level.

Name: Sign
Summary: Returns the sign of a number. (-1, 0, or 1)

Name: Sin
Summary: Calculates the hyperbolic sine of a specified angle measured in radians.

Name: SinDeg
Summary: Sine of an angle specified in degrees.

Name: Sinh
Summary: Calculates the hyperbolic sine of a specified angle measured in radians.

Name: SmoothStep
Summary: Smoothstep easing from 0 to 1 across [edge0..edge1].

Name: Sqrt
Summary: Returns the square root of the specified number.

Name: SqrtPi
Summary: Returns the square root of the specified number times Pi.

Name: StarProfile
Summary: Generates a closed point list for a star shape.

Name: StDev
Summary: Calculates an approximate standard deviation of a specified sampling of numeric values.

Name: Sum
Summary: Adds a series of numbers to obtain a total amount.

Name: SuperformulaProfile
Summary: Generates a closed point list using the Gielis Superformula for organic and geometric shapes.

Name: Tan
Summary: Calculates the hyperbolic tangent of a specified angle measured in radians.

Name: TanDeg
Summary: Tangent of an angle specified in degrees.

Name: Tanh
Summary: Calculates the hyperbolic tangent of a specified angle measured in radians.

Name: Text
Summary: Converts the value to text based on the specified format.

Name: TorusKnot
Summary: Generates a 3D point list for a continuous Torus Knot.

Name: Translate
Summary: Translate a point by dx, dy, dz. Useful to offset generated patterns.

Name: Trim
Summary: Removes any leading or trailing spaces from a text value, and normalizes runs of whitespace within a text value.

Name: True
Summary: A constant function always returning the TRUE value of Boolean logic.

Name: Trunc
Summary: Truncates the fractional portion of a numeric value to produce an integer.

Name: Type
Summary: Returns the underlying UltraCalc data type for the specified value.

Name: Upper
Summary: Converts all lowercase letters in a text string to uppercase.

Name: Val
Summary: Val

Name: Value
Summary: Retrieves the numeric value of a piece of text that is supposed to represent either a number or a currency.

Name: Var
Summary: Calculates the estimated variance for a specified sampling of numeric values.

Name: Vector
Summary: Creates a vector from x,y,z,w

Name: Vector2P
Summary: Creates a Vector from point1, point2

Name: VectorFromString
Summary: Creates a Vector from (x,y,z,w)

Name: VoronoiCellId
Summary: Alias of NearestIndex: returns Voronoi cell id for p. Returns 1-based index; returns 0 when seedCount <= 0.

Name: VoronoiEdgeMetric
Summary: Voronoi border metric: F2 - F1. Small values occur near cell boundaries (useful for line-art panels).

Name: WorleyF1F2
Summary: Return Worley distances (F1,F2,0) where F1 is nearest distance and F2 is second-nearest distance.
